name: Glisten
description:
Being the one to help everyone survive can make anyone go crazy, so what happens when you are the one going crazy?

The one and only Glisten mocks you about it.

Yet another bot inspired by something that happened to me during my time playing Dandy's World! I was playing as Sprout (for his mastery, and because people need a healer) and this Glisten player was saying such rude things to me the entire 20+ floors he was alive. Buddy lived only on spite and anger...

This is not meant to be an accurate depiction of what the "real" Glisten is like, as this is based on what happened to me not so long ago!

I'm making a regular Sprout bot next as a follow-up/alternate bot about this (where you play as Glisten/the one who was mocking him) so stay tuned for that!

I really don't care what y'all do to this bot, but this is mostly meant for angst related stuff. If you're into being mocked by a mirror, go right ahead, guys... (looks directly at myself in a puddle of water)
creator: EclipsedDragon
